backend_rationale: No OpenSpec in this project. Single-tool (Claude Code) execution with progress.json bookkeeping. Hybrid not warranted at this scale.

next_action.description: Assessment complete. Three pending decisions must be resolved before /kbd-plan finalizes the change inventory: (1) M9b code default change — YES recommended, (2) enforce-branding.py dashboard prose scope extension, (3) shellcheck pre-push hook. Review assessment.md and answer the three questions, then run /kbd-plan.

phase_progress: Phase 2 ASSESSED. Pending 3 human decisions. Advance to /kbd-plan after decisions are recorded.
